title: gazania linearis var. ovalis
intro: Gazania linearis var. ovalis, also known as the blue gazania, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gazania linearis var. ovalis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and fighting against infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
